summary: Comprehensive testing of Permissions Matrix, Reseller Authentication, and Stripe Checkout features completed. All 9 features tested successfully. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Permissions Matrix allows configuring page access levels (No View/View Only/View & Edit) for each role. Reseller authentication uses /api/auth/reseller/login endpoint. Stripe checkout endpoints return expected errors when Stripe keys are invalid (test keys configured but not valid).

1_permissions_matrix_tab.details: Permissions Matrix tab in User Management shows role selector, 11 permission rows (Dashboard, Products, Style Options, Measurements, Orders, Customers, Users & Roles, Static Pages, Stripe Settings, Marketing & SEO, Settings), and Save Changes button

2_permissions_matrix_save.details: Save Changes persists permissions to database. Tested changing Reseller role's Dashboard access from 'No View' to 'View Only' - saved successfully with toast confirmation

3_reseller_login.details: Reseller login works with credentials reseller@test.com / reseller123. Returns access_token, user info with role_id='reseller', permissions, and payment_methods

5_reseller_authentication_flow.details: After login, reseller can access dashboard and other reseller pages. Welcome toast shown on successful login

6_admin_permission_enforcement.details: Admin login returns user permissions. Admin sidebar filters nav items based on role permissions (tested via hasPermission function)

7_logo_styling.details: Homepage logo does NOT have white box/sticker look. Logo has transparent background (rgba(0,0,0,0)) with no border or box-shadow

8_stripe_checkout_create_session.details: /api/settings/checkout/create-session endpoint works. Returns 400 'Invalid API Key' when test keys are invalid (expected behavior). Returns 400 'Missing required fields' when required fields are missing

9_stripe_payment_verification.details: /api/settings/checkout/verify-payment endpoint works. Returns 400 'Invalid API Key' when test keys are invalid (expected behavior). Returns 400 'session_id is required' when session_id is missing

backend_tests_summary.TestResellerAuthentication: 5/5 passed - login success, invalid password, invalid email, /me endpoint, admin login as reseller
backend_tests_summary.TestPermissionsMatrix: 3/3 passed - get roles, update role permissions, create custom role with permissions
backend_tests_summary.TestStripeCheckout: 5/5 passed - get settings, get public key, create session (invalid keys), missing fields, verify payment
backend_tests_summary.TestAdminPermissionEnforcement: 2/2 passed - admin login returns permissions, reseller login returns role permissions

stripe_note: Stripe checkout endpoints return 400 'Invalid API Key' because test keys (pk_test_testkey123, sk_test_testkey123) are configured but not valid Stripe keys. This is expected behavior - real Stripe keys need to be configured in admin panel for checkout to work.
